task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Troubleshooting PRISMAsync Remote control (for Mobile alerting) on Settings Editor

abstract.p: This topic describes the fault analysis for the PRISMAsync Cloud Services.
The Cloud services consist of the following user applications:

prereq.p: A prerequisite for the correct operation of the cloud services applications is that Remote Service (ORS) is enabled and functional on the applicable host machines.
Please make sure ORS is enabled on the Colorado M-Series before you start troubleshooting the cloud services applications.

note.p: To troubleshoot the PRISMAsync Cloud Services, a valid Remote Service account is required.

section.title: 1st step: Testing connection between Printer and Cloud Services

li.p: Click on [Configuration] [Connectivity] [Cloud services] [Test Remote Control] [Send Test notification].
Click on “Send test notification”, the test result must be successful.
Check that Settings Editor / [Configuration] [Connectivity] [Cloud services] [Remote Control] is enabled.
Check that Remote connection is enabled (Touch UI/ System/ Remote Services/Remote connection/Remote connection) .
Check Proxy settings (Touch UI/ System/ Remote Services/Remote connection/Proxy settings).
Check that Remote connection status is “Connected” (Touch UI/ System / Remote Services/Remote connection /Test Remote connection).

section.title: 2nd step : Testing connection between Cloud Services and your mobile device :

li.p: Click on [Configuration][Connectivity][Cloud Services][Register printer for cloud services], a new page opens.
Log in with your Microsoft or Google administrator account, A new page opens.
Check on your Mobile device that you have received a notification

p.b: In case you ‘did not receive a notification on your Mobile device :

li.p: Check that the Notifications are allowed in the Mobile application “PRISMAsync Remote Control”.
Check that the Mobile application “PRISMAsync Remote Control” is not open foreground on your Mobile device (active in background is OK).
Check that the account you used to login on the PRISMAsync Remote Control” application is registered in the list of Users of PRISMAsync Remote Control.
